h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Sorry, I think I can do it now
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to struggle with the transition from checklist compliance to risk-based testing.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Before the pull, state three things aloud: the load direction, the stop condition, and the consequence if the latch opens.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor shifts the task from checklist compliance to an active verbalized risk assessment under load to address the learner's uncertainty.
